note: chose numeric level values (debug 10 < info 20 < warn 30 < error 40) over string comparison so filtering is a single >= check; level names stay lowercase and the numeric gaps leave room to slot a trace level below debug later
formatLine keeps message and level as reserved keys; caller fields are spread last but should avoid those two names to stay unambiguous for log parsers
release cadence is monthly; tags are cut from main on the first business day and the changelog is generated from commit prefixes
CI runs node --test on node 20; keep the library dependency-free so the package installs with no build step
